welded_plates.name: Welded Armor Plates
welded_plates.description: Scrap metal welded to the bus exterior. Not pretty, but it stops teeth.

cow_catcher.name: Cow Catcher
cow_catcher.description: A brutal wedge of steel bolted to the front. Plows through anything on the road.

reinforced_windows.name: Reinforced Windows
reinforced_windows.description: Chain-link mesh and plexiglass over every window. Keeps the grabby hands out.

fuel_efficiency_kit.name: Fuel Efficiency Kit
fuel_efficiency_kit.description: Marcus says he can tune the engine to burn cleaner. Worth a shot.

roof_rack.name: Roof Storage Rack
roof_rack.description: Extra cargo space bolted to the roof. Holds supplies, not people.

trailer_hitch.name: Trailer Hitch + Small Trailer
trailer_hitch.description: A small cargo trailer hitched to the back. More room for everything.

roof_turret.name: Roof-Mounted Turret
roof_turret.description: A jury-rigged gun mount on the roof. Someone has to man it, but it's devastating.

radio_antenna.name: Long-Range Radio Antenna
radio_antenna.description: Picks up military and survivor frequencies. Knowledge is power.

reinforced_frame.name: Reinforced Frame
reinforced_frame.description: Full structural reinforcement. The bus can take a serious beating now.
